description: session-close with --label removes the sessions row and prints 'closed: <label> at <cwd>'. No pair_key so no room-leave event is emitted.
pre_sql: INSERT INTO sessions (cwd, label, agent, role, session_key, pair_key, started_at, last_seen_at, receive_mode) VALUES ('__CWD__', 'alpha', 'claude', 'peer', 'existing-key', NULL, '2020-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2020-01-01T00:00:00Z', 'interactive');
